{{Infobox group
| name = House Gray
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[House]] Gray is a newly established organization formed following the destruction of previous houses, such as [[House Wylan]]. It serves as a sanctuary for various groups from across [[Rosegold]], offering them the security provided by a [[Sage]]. The house is composed of diverse members, including various Underlords, some of whom are seasoned leaders who have already pledged their allegiance to this new faction. While the house is a collection of many different people, its members' loyalty to their leaders often stems from professional respect for their skills rather than personal friendship. [[House]] Gray emerged from the aftermath of the [[Dread War]], existing in a state of tension with the Arelius clan despite the latter's history of providing resources and safety. Within the house, individuals like Reigan participate in competitive events, training against veteran Underlords to hone their abilities.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[House]] Gray is a noble house formed from the remaining fragments of various destroyed families and factions. Led by a [[Sage]], the group includes [[Reigan Shen]], who intends to guide the house to victory in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament. The house provides support to [[Tiberian]] during these events. In anticipation of a potential win, [[Valketh]] promises that the house will be in debt to [[Reigan Shen]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[House Gray]] is a new [[House]] composed of fragments of destroyed factions and families.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[House Gray]] is led by a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[House Gray]] is a group that [[Reigan Shen]] intends to lead to victory in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[House Gray]] is a house that includes [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[House Gray]] supports [[Tiberian]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[House Gray]] is a house that [[Valketh]] promises will be in debt to Reigan if he wins.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[House Gray]] is a noble house.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
